query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `knowledge_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `category` enum('material','process','surface','design','technical','supplier','general') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `tags` json,
  `source` varchar(512),
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `knowledge_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `image_library` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `category` enum('material','process','surface','reference','sample','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `tags` json,
  `file_key` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `file_url` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `file_size` int,
  `mime_type` varchar(128),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `image_library_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_sessions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_id` int,
  `customer_id` int,
  `prompt` text NOT NULL,
  `generated_text` text,
  `selected_image_ids` json,
  `used_knowledge_ids` json,
  `sent_as_email` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `sent_at` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `ai_sessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `cad_files` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_id` int NOT NULL,
  `project_item_id` int,
  `filename` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `file_key` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `file_url` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `file_size` int,
  `mime_type` varchar(128),
  `version` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `version_note` text,
  `parent_file_id` int,
  `uploaded_by` varchar(255),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `cad_files_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_sessions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

  `prompt` text NOT NULL,
  `generated_text` text,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `cad_files` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_id` int NOT NULL,
  `project_item_id` int,
  `filename` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `file_key` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `file_url` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `file_size` int,
  `mime_type` varchar(128),
  `version` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `version_note` text,
  `parent_file_id` int,
  `uploaded_by` varchar(255),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `cad_files_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
